description: An NVDA screen reader add-on that allows you to quickly get the current prayer times for Muslims anywhere on Earth.
changelog:
* Brought the add-on back to life
* Redeveloped the add-on from scratch
* Added the ability to automatically detect your current location, which is enabled by default
	* Note: This feature may not be perfectly accurate in all cases
	* For better accuracy, you can use a geographic location app on your phone and manually enter the latitude and longitude in the settings
	* You must disable the automatic location detection feature to manually edit these geographic coordinates
* Removed the country and city selection fields due to inaccuracies
* Changed the data provider to retrieve cleaner results
* Results are now displayed inside a readable text field
* Implemented data caching to provide instant results when checking prayer times again
	* This cache resets automatically when you restart NVDA or press OK in the settings dialog
* Added German translation
* Added README files for Arabic, English, and German
* Minor bug fixes and performance improvements

translations.description: NVDA Ekran okuyucusu için Namaz Vakitlerini söyleyen eklenti. NVDA+ALT+P kullanılabilir.
